chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/448)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/448)
text: قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي أَخْشَاكَ كَأَنِّي أَرَاكَ وَ أَسْعِدْنِي بِتَقْوَاكَ وَ لَا تُشْقِنِي بِنَشْطِي لِمَعَاصِيكَ وَ خِرْ لِي فِي قَضَائِكَ وَ بَارِكْ لِي فِي قَدَرِكَ حَتَّى لَا أُحِبَّ تَأْخِيرَ مَا عَجَّلْتَ وَ لَا تَعْجِيلَ مَا أَخَّرْتَ وَ اجْعَلْ غِنَايَ فِي نَفْسِي وَ مَتِّعْنِي بِسَمْعِي وَ بَصَرِي وَ اجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَارِثَيْنِ مِنِّي وَ انْصُرْنِي عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنِي وَ أَرِنِي فِيهِ قُدْرَتَكَ يَا رَبِّ وَ أَقِرَّ بِذَلِكَ عَيْنِي .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ismail Bin Sahl, from Abdullah Bin Jundab, from his father,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Say, ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Make me to fear You<sup>azwj</sup> as if I can see You<sup>azwj</sup>, and Assist me with being pious to You<sup>azwj</sup>, and do not Cause me to be miserable by my practicing to disobeying You<sup>azwj</sup>, and Choose for me in Your<sup>azwj</sup> Judgment, and Bless for me in Your<sup>azwj</sup> Ordainment until I do not love the delay of what You<sup>azwj</sup> Hasten nor hastening of what You<sup>azwj</sup> Delay; and Make self-sufficiency in myself, and Cause me to enjoy with my hearing and my vision, and Make them both as the inheritors from me, and Help me against the ones who oppress me, and Show me Your<sup>azwj</sup> Power in it, O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, and my eyes to be delighted with that’’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Isma’Il ibn Sahl from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab from his father from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Say, ‘O Lord, make me fear You as if I see You and help me to be pious before You, do not make me miserable because of my energy to disobey You, chose me for Your determination, bless me with Your measure so I will not love the delay of that which You have hastened and the quickening of what You have delayed. Make me self reliant, benefit me from my hearing, and eyes and make them inherent in me, support me against those who have done injustice to me, and show me Your power in it, O Lord, and make it a delight to my eyes.”’
